title: Enforcement Gate Result
description: Binding contract for a gate evaluation result (ENF-02). Produced by GateAdapter.evaluate(); consumed by Phase 8 gate routing. status pass|fail|waived is the enforcement decision — the binding boundary. findings[] carry structured SAST-style evidence. x-binding: binding — pass/fail/waived IS the enforcement decision; validateGateResult (07-02) hard-fails on schema-invalid output so no adapter can silently corrupt the audit trail.

status.description: The enforcement decision. `fail` blocks the gate; `waived` records an explicit override (audit-flagged).

findings.description: Zero or more findings. Empty array is valid (the noop-adapter `pass` contract).

finding.description: A single gate finding. Mirrors SAST tool output shape (id + severity + message + optional structured evidence).

evidence.description: Structured evidence pointer. Object form (per 07-CONTEXT.md Claude's Discretion recommendation) — matches SAST tool output; path + optional 1-based [startLine, endLine] range + optional URI.
